data.title: Johnson Fistel is looking into potential derivative claims on behalf of Molina Healthcare, Inc. (MOH) shareholders over alleged fiduciary breaches tied to undisclosed medical cost trends. Class action covers claims from February 5, 2025.
data.description: In San Diego on December 24, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP announced an investigation into potential derivative claims concerning Molina Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: MOH). The investigation relates to purported fiduciary breaches associated with undisclosed medical cost trends. The class action in question has a scope from February 5, 2025.

data.title: Xali Gold acquires Pico Machay Gold Project in Peru from Pan American Silver Corp on Dec 24, 2025.
data.description: Xali Gold Corp. (TSXV:XGC) based in Vancouver, British Columbia finalized the acquisition of the Pico Machay Gold Project in Peru on December 24, 2025. This advanced exploration stage project is targeted for near-term production. The acquisition involved Minera Calipuy S.A.C. (“Calipuy”), the owner of Pico Machay, being purchased from Pan American Silver Corp. (“Pan American”) and its subsidiary, Aquiline Resources Inc. The deal was first mentioned in a news release on October 24, 2025.

data.title: Johnson Fistel investigates possible fiduciary breaches in $210/share go-private deal of Electronic Arts (NASDAQ: EA) board members.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, a shareholder rights law firm based in San Diego, announced they are investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duties by the board members of Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA). The investigation is regarding the proposed sale of the gaming company to an investor. This news highlights a significant development in the financial sector, impacting shareholders of Electronic Arts Inc. The investigation signifies a substantial concern regarding the acquisition deal and the actions of the board members in relation to safeguarding shareholder interests. Stay tuned for further updates on this evolving situation.

data.title: Investigation launched by Johnson Fistel into Coupang, Inc. (NYSE: CPNG) for possible securities law violations.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, a shareholder rights law firm known as Johnson Fistel, PLLP announced an ongoing investigation into possible violations of federal securities laws by Coupang, Inc. (NYSE: CPNG) and some of its officers and directors. The focus of the investigation is to determine if there were false or misleading statements made, or a failure to disclose information that would be significant to the company's shareholders. Johnson Fistel, PLLP is delving into the matter to ensure transparency and accountability in the financial sector.

data.title: Binance adds som-pegged stablecoin post Kyrgyzstan's crypto advancements with new legislation and plans for national crypto reserve.
data.description: After passing crypto legislation, Kyrgyzstan has recently listed a new US dollar-pegged stablecoin backed by physical gold. This move comes as part of their initiative to establish a national crypto reserve.

data.title: TransMedics granted inducements under NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) on Dec 22, 2025.
data.description: On December 22, 2025, TransMedics Group, Inc., a medical technology company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol TMDX based in Andover, Massachusetts, shared significant news. The company specializes in revolutionizing organ transplant therapy for individuals suffering from advanced lung, heart, and liver conditions.

data.title: Nasdaq reports 15,012,659,234 shares in mid-Dec short interest for 3,486 stocks, up from 14,879,370,342 in Nov.
data.description: As of December 15, 2025, the short interest in 3,486 Nasdaq Global Market SM securities was 15,012,659,234 shares, up from 14,879,370,342 shares in 3,453 Global Market issues on November 28, 2025. This mid-December short interest accounts for 2.90 days, an increase from 2.22 days during the previous reporting period.

data.title: Top AI Large Learning Models in 2025. These models shine in autonomous coding and vision tasks.
data.description: In 2025, several LLMs garnered significant attention, including autonomous coding assistants and vision models capable of processing entire codebases. These innovative technologies showcased the potential of artificial intelligence in various fields.

data.title: XTL Biopharmaceuticals Ltd received a Nasdaq notification for not meeting $1 per share minimum bid price for 30 days.
data.description: In Ramat Gan, Israel, on December 24, 2025, XTL Biopharmaceuticals Ltd. (Nasdaq: XTLB) (TASE: XTLB.TA) disclosed that it has been informed by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC's Listing Qualifications Department about its non-compliance with the minimum bid price requirement of $1 per share over the last 30 consecutive business days. This notification was received through a letter dated December 22, 2025. As per Nasdaq Listing Rules 5550(a)(2), XTL currently falls short of meeting this ongoing listing criterion.

data.title: Scully Royalty updates on shareholders' meeting & court proceedings, appeals Grand Court decision.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Scully Royalty Ltd. (NYSE: SRL) revealed that it has submitted an appeal against the ruling made by the Grand Court of the Cayman Islands on December 19, 2025. This appeal follows the news release from December 22, 2025, issued by the company.

data.title: Nutrien's earnings surged by 149% last quarter, leading to RSR upgrade from 80 to 84; Analysts project stronger growth.
data.description: Nutrien's stock price has been on the rise, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 80 to 84. The company reported a substantial 149% increase in earnings in the last quarter. Analysts are optimistic about Nutrien's future growth prospects, anticipating even stronger performance ahead.

data.title: Bitcoin's $30.3B options expiry shows bearish sentiment, despite stimulus hopes and positive 2026 outlook for US investors.
data.description: Despite American investors anticipating economic stimulus injections and holding a somewhat optimistic outlook for 2026, the Bitcoin options markets continue to show a bias towards bearish sentiment. This indicates a lack of strong bullish sentiment with regards to Bitcoin, despite the potential for growth in the coming year.
